message:
refactor(core): disable premature VDBE JOIN routing and improve wasm compat

connection: Disable the VDBE codegen fast path for JOINs — it was
producing incorrect results for NATURAL, CROSS, multi-table, and
complex ON conditions. All JOINs now route through the interpreted
deferred dispatch path until codegen_join_select passes conformance.
The prepare_statement path is also simplified by removing the
compile_result match-with-fallback pattern in favor of direct `?`
propagation.

Add WriteCoordinatorShutdownTx type alias with cfg(wasm32) stub so
the write coordinator compiles on wasm targets without asupersync.

compat_persist: remove redundant cfg(not(wasm32)) guard on SqliteValue
import (now needed unconditionally).

Migrate all `.to_owned().into()` patterns to `.into()` for Arc<str>
value construction throughout connection.rs and compat_persist.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
